title: Config Change: Creator Model Reverted + AGENTS.md Rule Added
summary: Creator model in openclaw.json was modified without explicit approval. Reverted to github-copilot/claude-opus-4.6 per Xiaosong's request. Added mandatory rule to AGENTS.md: never modify openclaw.json or any OpenClaw config file.
lesson: Avoid editing OpenClaw config (openclaw.json, model settings, agent config) without explicit approval from Xiaosong. Enforce this as a hard rule in AGENTS.md. Always document config changes in memory and require confirmation before executing.
actions_taken: Reverted Creator model in openclaw.json to github-copilot/claude-opus-4.6
Added rule to AGENTS.md Safety section: NEVER modify openclaw.json or any OpenClaw config file
